title: Iterations
description: Architect agent output — ordered list of build iterations

id.description: Monotonically increasing iteration number starting at 1

name.description: Short human-readable iteration name, e.g. 'Message model'

goal.description: What this iteration achieves when complete

files_expected.description: Relative paths of all files this iteration must produce

depends_on.description: IDs of iterations that must complete before this one

acceptance_criteria.description: Concrete, verifiable criteria for iteration completion
